MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-26-26 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHIFTED ITS INITIAL BURDEN REGARDING THE AMOUNT OF RENT DUE AT THE TIME THE NOTICE WAS SERVED. THE DECLARATION OF CRIS LAMAS EXPRESSLY REFERS TO AN ADDENDUM INCLUDED IN EXHIBIT 1 THERETO. HOWEVER, EXHIBIT 1, AS FILED, CONTAINS NO SUCH ADDENDUM, AND TERMINATES AT PAGE 16 OF 18. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 1555 HYDE LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff has not shifted its initial burden regarding the amount of rent due at the time the Notice was served. The Declaration of Cris Lamas expressly refers to an Addendum included in Exhibit 1 thereto. However, Exhibit 1, as filed, contains no such Addendum, and terminates at Page 16 of 18.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
